title: Bridge Essay: Ultra-high-field fMRI insights on insight: Neural correlates of the Aha!-moment.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Ultra-high-field, fMRI, insights, on, insight:.

**Ultra-high-field fMRI insights on insight: Neural correlates of the Aha!-moment.** — Hum Brain Mapp. PMID: 29665228. DOI: 10.1002/hbm.24073. Finding creative solutions to difficult problems is afundamental aspect of human culture and askill highly needed. However, the exact neural processes underlying creative problem solving remain unclear. Insightful problem solving tasks were shown to be avalid method for investigating one subcomponent of creativity: the Aha!-moment. Finding insightful solutions during aremote associates task (RAT) was found to elicit specific cortical activity changes. Considering the strong affective compone
